title: Actinodaphne sphaerocarpa
taxonomy: Actinodaphne sphaerocarpa is classified within the family Lauraceae and is a species of plant in the genus Actinodaphne. This genus is a group of evergreen shrubs and small trees. The Lauraceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as laurels. They are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Actinodaphne sphaerocarpa is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia.
uses: Actinodaphne sphaerocarpa has been reported to have medicinal uses in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
